nasb.text: You shall put some of your authority on him, in order that all the congregation of the sons of Israel may obey him.

esv.text: You shall invest him with some of your authority, that all the congregation of the people of Israel may obey.

cnv.text: 你要把你的尊榮給他幾分，好叫以色列全體會眾都聽從他。

ccb.text: 把你的权柄赐给他，使以色列全体会众都听从他。
